steps.title: Identify the parallel pair
steps.content: The sentence describes two hands as a parallel pair: “one hand [blank] and the other [description].” Both parts must follow the same grammatical form.

steps.title: Match the parallel form
steps.content: C creates truly parallel descriptions: “one hand bare and the other covered” — both use only adjectives, creating a balanced pair. The other choices disrupt this by mixing adjectives with verb phrases or creating structural problems. That matches choice C — C is correct.
